title: charred shaggy ukrainian bowl
description: a romantic, charred dish featuring tender beef and vegetables, served in a dolsot stone bowl with a side of spicy bhuna sauce.
instructions: season the beef with kosher salt and black pepper.
grill the beef for 5 minutes per side, or until medium-rare.
let the beef rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
slice the red onion and red bell pepper into thick strips.
grill the vegetables for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
slice the zucchini and eggplant into thick rounds.
grill the eggplant for an additional 2 minutes, or until tender.
saute the garlic and white wine in olive oil until the liquid has almost completely evaporated.
stir in the bhuna sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
to assemble the dish, place a portion of the grilled vegetables in the bottom of a dolsot stone bowl.
top with sliced beef, spooning some of the bhuna sauce over the top.
garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
